title: Appetite loss

examination.text: Supports clinician-recorded malnutrition or risk criteria and consent or best-interest discussion; no diagnosis, calculation, feeding route, or treatment is generated.
examination.rationale: The exact risk-context section supports clinician-entered measured nutrition status, examination, reviewed results, discussion, and follow-up without calculating risk or generating nutrition support.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-recorded malnutrition or risk criteria and consent or best-interest discussion; no diagnosis, calculation, feeding route, or treatment is generated.

source.title: Nutrition support for adults: oral nutrition support, enteral tube feeding and parenteral nutrition — Recommendations

investigations.text: Supports documenting unintentional weight loss, appetite, taste, swallowing, bowel habit, prolonged illness, BMI, percentage weight loss, reduced intake and future intake risk when actually assessed.
investigations.rationale: The exact adult nutrition-screening section supports appetite, reduced intake, taste, swallowing, bowel habit, illness, weight loss, BMI context, duration, and impact without assigning malnutrition or cause.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting unintentional weight loss, appetite, taste, swallowing, bowel habit, prolonged illness, BMI, percentage weight loss, reduced intake and future intake risk when actually assessed.

source_limitations: Measured intake, weight trajectory, BMI, swallowing safety, mood, pregnancy, cause, diagnosis, tests, dietetic input, nutrition support, referral, and interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.

All previously supported GP legacy-item mappings were conservatively removed because exact item identity, direct support, and item-specific applicability were not independently established under the fail-closed contract.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
